name: operator-enrichment-r
description: Built-in atomic operator plugin: Single functional-enrichment operator powered by base R.

interface.shortDescription: Functional enrichment powered by base R
interface.longDescription: Provides one atomic hypergeometric functional enrichment operator for query gene lists and GMT or two-column TSV gene sets.
defaultPrompt: Expose the functional enrichment plugin and run it on my ranked or significant gene list.
